title: East Moor (near Sutton-on-the-Forest) served Memorial
aircraft_type: General memorial to all who served
squadron: Various squadrons based at East Moor
memorial_type: Airfield memorial near site of former East Moor airfield

maintainer.notes: Airfield memorial near site of former RAF East Moor.

external_narratives.summary: Imperial War Museums register entry for the memorial to 415, 429, and 432 Squadrons RCAF at the former East Moor airfield site near Sutton-on-the-Forest. The memorial sundial cairn commemorates 640 RCAF aircrew who lost their lives during operations from the airfield.
key_details: 640 RCAF aircrew lost from this airfield

external_narratives.summary: 415 Squadron Association page documenting annual memorial services at the East Moor memorial cairn. The sundial cairn was installed in 1990 at the village pound in Sutton-on-the-Forest by Canadian veterans of the three RCAF squadrons.
key_details: Annual memorial services attended by Canadian veterans

external_narratives.summary: Memorial record for the 415, 429, and 432 Squadrons RCAF memorial at Eastmoor Airfield. The sandstone and Westmoreland slate sundial cairn was erected by Canadian veterans in remembrance of their fallen comrades.
key_details: Sandstone base with Westmoreland slate sundial
Purchased and erected by Canadian veterans

external_narratives.summary: Village community page about the annual East Moor memorial service. Describes the ongoing relationship between the village and Canadian veterans and their families who return annually to commemorate the 640 aircrew lost.
